title: crupina insularis
intro: Crupina insularis, also known as the Italian thistle, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reducing pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Crupina insularis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its bioactive compounds.
